utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well that is because you always sleep to noon , silly ! This is what 9 looks like .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I guess I will get washed up then . Watch that sunrise .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am really getting tired of sneaking around .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I am really getting tired of sneaking around .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know what if we went away for a whole weekend ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know we would have no interruptions and we could be naked the entire time .

emotion_cause.span: 10_we would have no interruptions and we could be naked the entire time .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All weekend ? That is a whole lotta naked .

emotion_cause.span: 10_we would have no interruptions and we could be naked the entire time .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , I can say that I have a conference and you can say you have a chef thing .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ohh , I have always wanted to go to this culinary fair that they have in Jersey !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , you know your not though . Let go .
